chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 14 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 94/2011. 2. For hearing of main petition. 25.02.2026. Mr. Rab Nawaz, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Sameer Arshad Tayebaly, Advocate for Respondent. ********** Mr. Rab Nawaz, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, Advocate for the Petitioner, who is not present. Previous Order Sheets reflect that the Petitioner has also remained absent. This matter has been pending for over 15 years without any significant progress. It appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this matter, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE AYAZ
